setup: Why did the scarecrow win an award?
punch: Because he was outstanding in his field!

setup: What do you call a fish with no eyes?
Why can't a bicycle stand up by itself?
What did the ocean say to the beach?
Why did the math book look so sad?
punch: Because it had too many problems!

setup: What do you call cheese that isn't yours?
Why do video game characters make bad friends?
punch: They're always playing games with you!

setup: What did one wall say to the other wall?
punch: I'll meet you at the corner!

setup: Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants?
punch: In case he got a hole in one!

setup: What do you call a dinosaur that crashes his car?
Why don't eggs tell jokes?
What's a robot's favorite snack?
punch: Computer chips! Like me! Well, I don't eat mine.

setup: Why did the student eat his homework?
punch: Because the teacher said it was a piece of cake!

setup: What do you call a bear with no teeth?
Why are ghosts such bad liars?
punch: Because you can see right through them!

setup: What has ears but cannot hear?
Why did the banana go to the doctor?
What do you call a sleeping dinosaur?
How does the moon cut his hair?
What's brown and sticky?
Why did the cookie go to the nurse?
What kind of music do planets like?
